title: Add an executable Result-aware example
scenario: Other teams will copy the public percentage API into pricing and rollout code. The docs should show fallible construction without teaching unwrap as normal usage.
instructions: Add a rustdoc example above Percentage. Show a successful TryFrom call using ? and assert the value without using unwrap.

hints.body: A hidden Ok type lets the doctest use ?.
Use the public API exactly as downstream callers would.
Keep the example short and executable.

completionExplanation: The public documentation now demonstrates fallible construction with an executable Result example that callers can copy into policy code.
